## Research workflow change

Describe what changes and what it means for screening, annotation, training, or result trustworthiness.

## Validation

- [ ] The change was developed and tested in the development repository first.
- [ ] Public synchronization reported only the intended files.
- [ ] I did not add credentials, databases, PDFs, TIFs, model weights, or runtime output.
- [ ] I ran the documented release checks in the public repository.
- [ ] I will wait for Windows, Ubuntu, and macOS CI before merging.
- [ ] I did not create or move a release tag in this pull request.
